coverLetter:
18 July 2026

Hiring Team
Empire Life
Re: Project Manager

Dear Hiring Team at Empire Life,

My background as an I am a direct match for the Project Manager role at Empire Life. My experience leading end-to-end delivery for the Australian Taxation Office's Payday Super reform program — a large-scale, multi-squad government initiative — directly aligns with the project management demands of this role at Empire Life.

The role calls for a Project Manager who can drive agile delivery, manage stakeholder expectations, and ensure on-time, on-budget outcomes. I have led the Agile Kookaburras squad on the Payday Super program, owning sprint cadence, PI Planning, and executive reporting, while recovering a mathematically infeasible SIT window through a tiered harness build and contingency ladder. I also convened cross-discipline technical war rooms to unblock testing and steered Distribution UI delivery to 95%+ completion, demonstrating the collaborative leadership needed to align diverse teams toward a common goal.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience driving agile transformations and delivering complex programs can contribute to Empire Life's project portfolio. I am available for a call at your convenience and can provide further details on the outcomes I have achieved across government, finance, and telecommunications.

Sincerely,
Administrator

18 July 2026

Hiring Team
openai
Re: Support Delivery Lead, Government

Dear Hiring Team at openai,

My background as an I am a direct match for the Support Delivery Lead, Government role at openai. My experience leading technical delivery for a government program and architecting automation that reduced manual effort by 92% aligns with OpenAI's need for a Support Delivery Lead who can build a team that resolves complex issues and operationalizes solutions at scale.

OpenAI’s Support Delivery Lead role calls for someone who can build and lead a team of technical experts, operationalize solutions at scale, and take an automation-first approach. At the Australian Taxation Office, I lead the Agile Kookaburras squad on the Payday Super program, and I architected a COBOL/mainframe test-automation harness that cut evidence effort by 92% across 200+ SIT/E2E scenarios, operationalizing a solution that eliminated manual bottlenecks for all eight squads. At ANZ, I directed a $5M+ program portfolio, leading 5+ cross-functional squads to deliver cloud-native modernizations and AI/ML solutions, including a real-time telemetry system that reduced P95 latency to under 200 ms for 10k+ concurrent devices. I also convened a cross-discipline war room that produced a binding automation recommendation in under three hours, demonstrating the collaborative, cross-functional partnership this role requires.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience leading technical teams and scaling automation can support OpenAI’s government customers. I am available for a call at your convenience and can provide further details on my work at the ATO and ANZ.

Sincerely,
Administrator

17 July 2026

Hiring Team
replit
Re: Enterprise Product Manager

Dear Hiring Team at replit,

My background as an I am a direct match for the Enterprise Product Manager role at replit. I have led enterprise platform modernisations and AI/ML solutions in regulated financial environments, directly matching Replit's need to build enterprise-grade identity, governance, and compliance capabilities for large-scale adoption.

Your job description calls for fluency with IT and admin buyer personas and the capabilities they need to adopt software at scale—SSO, SCIM, governance, and data privacy. At ANZ, I directed a $5M+ program portfolio modernising core banking platforms to cloud-native architecture, ensuring 100% compliance with enterprise architectural standards and risk models. I also led the technical delivery of real-time WebSocket telemetry servers handling 10k+ concurrent devices, reducing P95 latency to under 200 ms, demonstrating the kind of technical judgment and infrastructure depth required to build Replit's enterprise platform. Additionally, at the Australian Taxation Office, I architected a COBOL/mainframe test-automation harness that cut evidence effort by ~92% across 200+ scenarios, showing I can drive measurable efficiency gains in complex, regulated environments.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience building enterprise platforms and AI solutions in regulated settings can help Replit turn its early enterprise traction into a company-wide standard. I am available for a call at your convenience next week to walk through specific approaches to identity, governance, and land-and-expand motions.

Sincerely,
Administrator

16 July 2026

Hiring Team
Stripe
Re: Program Manager, Intake & Portfolio Management

Dear Hiring Team at Stripe,

My background in end-to-end delivery leadership is a direct match for the Program Manager, Intake & Portfolio Management role at Stripe. The demands this role places on mission-critical delivery ownership map directly onto how I already run programs.

My experience spans end-to-end delivery leadership and technical program management across mission-critical programs. I built LLM evaluation stacks with Langfuse and Phoenix, delivered analytics applications with Next.js and Supabase, and cut evidence effort from roughly 3 hours to about 15 minutes per scenario while owning governance and change management.

I would value the chance to discuss how my delivery and engineering experience maps to your team, and I am happy to meet for an interview whenever suits you.

Sincerely,
Administrator
